sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n74356" key="o)cupodi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀξῠ-ποδία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n74356.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">quickening of one's pace,</tr_> ib.</sense> </entryFree>
